_meta.source: xu4/src(靜態抽取 screenMessage/N/Center/TextAt 字面)
_meta.note: en = 硬編格式字串(含 %s/%d、\n);zh 待填。含 % 者於 H1 hook 需 format-aware 處理(post-vsnprintf 比對 / fragment 替換)。

strings.en: %cYou don't have enough reagents to mix %d spells!%c
A voice rings out:  What virtue exists independently of Truth, Love, and Courage?
As thou doth approach, a voice rings out: What virtue dost stem from %s?

The Voice says: Use thy Stone.

Color:
The altar changes before thyne eyes!
Then what is the one thing which encompasses and is the whole of all undeniable Truth, unending Love, and unyielding Courage?

There are holes for 4 stones.
What colors:
A:
You cast the Skull of Mondain into the Abyss!
You hold the evil Skull of Mondain the Wizard aloft...
%cYou cannot mix any more of that spell!%c
%cYou cannot mix that much more of that spell!%c

Above the din, the voice asks:

If all eight virtues of the Avatar combine into and are derived from the Three Principles of Truth, Love and Courage...

Alt-Q: Main Menu
Alt-V: Version
Alt-X: Quit
As you light the Candle the Earth Trembles!
In the middle of the night while out on a stroll...
Once mounted, the Wheel glows with a blue light!

Oops, you just got too close to beating the game.
BAD AVATAR!
The Bell rings on and on!
The Horn sounds an eerie tone!
The words resonate with the ringing!
Thou dost not have the Key of Three Parts.
Thou dost not know the true nature of the Universe.
Thou doth find one third of the Three Part Key!
Thou hast achieved partial Avatarhood in the Virtue of %s
Thy quest is not yet complete.
Thy thoughts are pure. Thou art granted a vision!
Trapped at sea without thy ship, thou dost drown!
Upon which virtue dost thou meditate?

j: Jimmy lock
k: Klimb
l: Locate
m: Mix reagents
n: New Order
o: Open door
p: Peer at Gem
q: Quit & Save
r: Ready weapon
s: Search
t: Talk
(more)

l - Location
m - Mixtures

p - Peer
r - Reagents
s - Summon
t - Transports
v - Full Virtues
w - Change Wind
x - Exit Map

u: Use Item
v: Volume On/Off
w: Wear armour
x: eXit
y: Yell
z: Ztats
Space: Pass
,: - Music Vol
.: + Music Vol
<: - Sound Vol
>: + Sound Vol
(more)

Help:
1-8   - Gate
F1-F8 - +Virtue
a - Adv. Moons
c - Collision
e - Equipment
f - Full Stats
g - Goto
h - Help
i - Items

Key Reference:
Arrow Keys: Move
a: Attack
b: Board
c: Cast Spell
d: Descend
e: Enter
f: Fire Cannons
g: Get Chest
h: Hole up
i: Ignite torch
(more)

Locate position
with sextant
 Latitude: %c'%c"
Longitude: %c'%c"
Thou art not able to focus thy thoughts with that Mantra!
Thou art unable to focus thy thoughts on this subject!
Thou dost not bear the rune of entry!  A strange force keeps you out!
Thy mind is still weary from thy last Meditation!
You enter the ancient shrine and sit before the altar...

You find a Fountain.
Who drinks?

You find a Magical Ball...
Who touches?

You see a knob
on the telescope
marked A-P
You Select:
